response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack development experience and leadership in open-source projects, but lacks direct experience with C++ (only minimal exposure via National Instruments) and cloud infrastructure leadership. While they demonstrate technical breadth and mentoring in workshops, they do not meet the core minimum requirement of 8 years in C++. Their experience aligns more with web/mobile development and tooling rather than large-scale cloud compute infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in open-source and technical workshops, demonstrating mentoring and knowledge-sharing skills
Strong full-stack development background across multiple languages and frameworks (Node.js, TypeScript, D, Ember.js, etc.)
Experience with CI/CD, DevOps practices, and scalable systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests per second)
concerns: No significant C++ experience (required for 8+ years) or direct cloud infrastructure leadership background
Limited production-level cloud architecture experience as described in the job requirements
Resume shows a heavy focus on web/mobile development rather than distributed systems or compute platforms
